morning.content:
"Take the role of a Principal Engineer at a FAANG company. Review this architecture decision. For each option give me: (1) What breaks at 10x scale (2) What breaks at 100x scale (3) The one thing everyone overlooks."

Forces AI to think in systems, not just code.

hero.ig_caption:
AI website builders crossed the production-quality threshold. 10x generates sitemaps, wireframes, style guides, and full pages from one prompt. Day 14 of 30.

#ai #tech #developer #startup #coding #automation #futureofwork #aitools

gem.problem: Stop recording your screen to explain a bug to your team.
gem.one: Records your screen and auto-generates a step-by-step visual guide. Zero editing.
bullets: Captures clicks, scrolls, and typed text automatically
Outputs a shareable link with annotated screenshots
Turns a 10-minute walkthrough into a 60-second read
